title: Relations, Rows, Domains, Keys, and Missing Information
description: Support tickets, teams, members, and events must become a precise relational model without duplicate identity or invented missing values. Learners cumulatively produce a key-and-null-aware relational model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Explain relations, tuples, attributes, domains, degree, cardinality, and why row order is not relational meaning.
Distinguish superkeys, candidate keys, primary keys, alternate keys, and stable surrogate identifiers.
Model optional and required references with foreign keys and predict update or delete consequences.
